title: Presidential Memorandum calls for listing Antifa as a terrorist organization and inadmissibility of Antifa associates
description_html: The Presidential Memorandum on Inadmissibility of Persons Affiliated with Antifa Based on Organized Criminal Activity calls for the Secretary of State "to assess whether to classify Antifa as a terrorist organization under [8 U.S.C. § 1182(a)(3)(B)(vi)," and "to consider listing Antifa in 9 FAM 302.5-4(B)(2)(U) Aliens Who Are Members of an Identified Criminal Organization." [ID# 1279]
